mapper.sql: SELECT d.no, h.apt_seq, h.apt_nm, dc.sido_name, dc.gugun_name, dc.dong_name, h.umd_nm, h.jibun, h.road_nm, h.build_year, h.latitude, h.longitude, d.apt_dong, d.floor, d.deal_year, d.deal_month, d.deal_day, d.exclu_use_ar, d.deal_amount
FROM housedeals d JOIN houseinfos h ON d.apt_seq = h.apt_seq LEFT JOIN dongcodes dc ON CONCAT(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) = dc.dong_code
mapper.select: FROM ( SELECT no FROM housedeals ORDER BY deal_year DESC, deal_month DESC, deal_day DESC, no DESC LIMIT #{limit} ) recent JOIN housedeals d ON d.no = recent.no JOIN houseinfos h ON d.apt_seq = h.apt_seq LEFT JOIN dongcodes dc ON CONCAT(h.sgg_cd, h.umd_cd) = dc.dong_code ORDER BY d.deal_year DESC, d.deal_month DESC, d.deal_day DESC, d.no DESC
